title: ExportLine
description: One NDJSON line emitted by `rebar export` (and rebar.export_tickets): a full compiled ticket object (the TicketState shape) plus a `schema_version` discriminator for the export-line format. NDJSON serves reporting (row-oriented, stream-parseable) and migration (each line re-imports as a full ticket) from one artifact. With `--strip-external`, external-tracker linkage (bridge_alerts, per-comment jira_comment_id, provider keys) is absent. Imported tickets additionally carry provenance (source_id/source_created_at/source_author/source_env). Unknown properties are allowed so the projection can evolve without breaking consumers.

schema_version.description: Export-line format version (independent of the event-log SCHEMA_VERSION). Bump when the per-line shape changes in a way importers must be aware of.
